title: Full Bright
description: Experience no jumpscares after adding this texture pack to ur world!
body:
# 🌕 D & A Fullbright – Ultimate Visibility Pack
D & A Fullbright is a lightweight resource pack that removes all darkness from Minecraft, giving you perfect visibility in caves, at night, or underwater — without using mods or cheats. Designed for survival, PvP, and exploration, this pack is 100% vanilla-friendly and server-safe.

🔧 Features:

🕳️ Perfect for caving, mining, and building

🌑 Works in total darkness, the Nether, and The End

🔌 Multiplayer/Server-safe (doesn’t modify gameplay)

🧠 Designed for performance and simplicity

🎮 Compatible with all versions from 1.8 to 1.21.5 AND EVEN Future versions

💾 Installation:
Download the .zip file

Move it to your resourcepacks folder

Enable it in .Minecraft > Options > Resource Packs

Enjoy full visibility anytime, anywhere!

📌 Notes:
This is a resource pack, not a mod

Compatible with OptiFine, Sodium, Lunar, Badlion, etc.

Works with any other texture pack — just place D & A Fullbright on top in the pack order

Make your Minecraft experience brighter, cleaner, and easier — without any extra tools.
